constraints.text: The dashboard cannot route View in Logs through fuzzy lineage guesses; missing mappings must remain disabled.
Profile and project lineage cannot leak raw domain content across profile boundaries.

decisions.text: The general profile is the governance hub for reusable protocol, dashboard exports, and cross-project structure.
The ehrlab profile is a domain knowledge profile rather than the global governance hub.
View in Logs requires exact lineage mapping from a node or edge to a concrete exported artifact path.

requirements.text: The repo manifest and memory graph must identify harness-self-governance as the active project for the general profile.
Unmapped nodes and edges must hide or disable View in Logs instead of guessing a fuzzy destination.

summary: The profile, project, and lineage model defines general as the governance hub, ehrlab as the domain profile, harness-self-governance as the active project, and exact lineage mapping as the contract behind View in Logs behavior.
